---
title: "Cost of Living in San Francisco "
about: 
  template: solana
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| code-fold: true

library(tidycensus) 
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(tigris)
library(patchwork)
library(mapview)

```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| code-fold: true

sf_var <- c(
  med_gross_rent = "B25064_001",
  med_income = "B19013_001",
  med_housing_cost = "B25105_001")

```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| code-fold: true

# SF data
sf_data <- get_acs(
  geography = "tract", 
  variables = sf_var,
  state = "CA", 
  county = "San Francisco", 
  output = "wide",
  geometry = TRUE, 
  year = 2020
) %>%
  st_transform(7131)|> 
  filter(!GEOID %in% c(
    "06075980401"  # filtering out Farallon Islands
  ))


```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| code-fold: true

# viewing with mapview 
mapview(sf_data)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| code-fold: true

# mapping median rent estimate 
med_rent_map <- ggplot(sf_data, aes(fill = med_gross_rentE)) +
  geom_sf(color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako",
                       labels = scales::label_dollar()) +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Verdana")) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(fill = "Median Household Income ")

med_rent_map

```
